## 📖 Documentation Section
**Which section of documentation needs improvement?**

**Core Documentation:**
- [ ] 📄 README.md
- [ ] 🔧 API Documentation
- [ ] ⚙️ Development Setup Guide
- [ ] 🚀 Deployment Guide
- [ ] 👤 User Guide/Manual

**Developer Documentation:**

- [ ] 🧪 Testing Guidelines

- [ ] 🔄 CI/CD Documentation
- [ ] 🐛 Troubleshooting Guide

**User Documentation:**
- [ ] 🎓 Learning Path Guides
- [ ] 📱 Mobile App Documentation
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility Guidelines

**Other:** ___________

## 🔍 Issue Description
**What documentation is missing, unclear, or incorrect?**
A clear and concise description of the documentation issue.

**Specific Problems:**
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Information is outdated
- [ ] Information is incorrect
- [ ] Information is unclear/confusing
- [ ] Poor organization/structure
- [ ] Missing examples/code samples
- [ ] Broken links or references
- [ ] Inconsistent formatting

## 💡 Suggested Improvement
**Describe what changes or additions would improve the documentation:**

**Proposed Changes:**
- Content to add: [e.g. Step-by-step setup instructions, Code examples]
- Content to update: [e.g. Outdated API endpoints, Deprecated features]
- Content to reorganize: [e.g. Better section structure, Improved navigation]
- Visual improvements: [e.g. Diagrams, Screenshots, Videos]

**Who is the primary audience for this documentation?**

**Developer Audience:**
- [ ] 🆕 New developers (first-time contributors)
- [ ] 👨‍💻 Experienced contributors
- [ ] 🏗️ System architects

## 📊 Current Impact
**How does the current documentation issue affect users?**

**Severity:**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Prevents getting started entirely
- [ ] 🟠 High - Causes significant confusion/delays
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Minor confusion, workaround available
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Cosmetic/nice-to-have improvement

**Impact Areas:**
- [ ] 🚫 Prevents getting started
- [ ] 😕 Causes confusion during development
- [ ] ❓ Missing critical information
- [ ] 📅 Outdated information causing errors
- [ ] 🗂️ Poor organization/structure
- [ ] 🔍 Difficult to find information
- [ ] 🌐 Accessibility barriers
- [ ] 🏝️ Cultural accuracy concerns

## 🏝️ Cultural Sensitivity
**If this relates to cultural content or Tahitian language documentation:**

**Cultural Considerations:**
- [ ] Traditional knowledge accuracy
- [ ] Proper pronunciation guides
- [ ] Cultural context requirements
- [ ] Respectful language usage
- [ ] Community input needed
- [ ] Elder/expert review required

**Language Accuracy:**
- [ ] Tahitian language spelling/grammar
- [ ] Diacritical marks (macrons, etc.)
- [ ] Regional dialect variations
- [ ] Translation accuracy
- [ ] Audio pronunciation guides

## 📸 Supporting Materials
**Additional context that would help improve the documentation:**

**Current Issues:**
- Screenshots of confusing sections
- Error messages encountered
- Links to related discussions

**Improvement Examples:**
- Examples from other projects
- Mockups of improved layout
- Reference materials

## 🎯 Success Criteria
**How will we know this documentation improvement is successful?**
- [ ] New users can complete setup without assistance
- [ ] Reduced support tickets for this topic
- [ ] Positive community feedback
- [ ] Improved onboarding metrics
- [ ] Cultural accuracy verified by community

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have identified the specific documentation section
- [ ] I have described the current problem clearly
- [ ] I have suggested specific improvements
- [ ] I have considered cultural sensitivity (if applicable)
- [ ] I have included supporting materials/examples
